ddls:
CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the candidate */,
  "party" TEXT /* Party affiliation of the candidate */,
  "candidate_description" TEXT /* Short description of the candidate */,
  "candidate_website" TEXT /* Candidate's website URL */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election result */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election event */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate */,
  "votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes received by the candidate */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage of total votes received by the candidate */,
  "winner" INTEGER /* Whether the candidate won the election */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "delegates" (
  "delegate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each delegate result */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election event */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate */,
  "delegates_won" INTEGER /* Number of delegates won by the candidate */,
  "delegate_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of total delegates won by the candidate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("delegate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_delegates_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "state_abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the state */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state the county belongs to */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the county */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_counties_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "precincts" (
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each precinct */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county the precinct belongs to */,
  "precinct_name" TEXT /* Name of the precinct */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the precinct */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("precinct_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_precincts_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Short description of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election data file */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the file (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the file in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_data_files_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validation_rules" (
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation rule */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "rule_name" TEXT /* Name of the rule */,
  "rule_description" TEXT /* Short description of the rule */,
  "rule_sql" TEXT /* SQL code for the rule */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validation_rules_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality metric */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Short description of the metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_metrics_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)
